title: FixIEDoubleDrop
description: Fix Immersive Engineering Double Drops bug for 1.12.2 forge server
body:
THIS PLUGIN CAN ONLY USE ON 1.12.2 FORGE-BUKKIT MIXED SERVER LIKE [CatServer](https://catmc.org/) OR [Mohist](https://mohistmc.com/)

this plugin will prevent player to break Immersive Engineering Multiblock Inventory when it has item inside.

[[Immersive Engineering] how to get double drops](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Tt4y1o7bv)

I'm too lazy to make commands and permissions, let's make do with it.

![preview](https://onemanager-windmourns-projects.vercel.app/pic/output%202024-02-20%2015-13-43.gif)
